message:
feat(tui): Update UI components for HGT and bias decomposition features

Add documentation, shortcuts, and menu entries for the new HGT passport
and dinucleotide bias decomposition features across all relevant UI
components for discoverability and consistency.

Changes to Footer.tsx:
- Added 'hgt: H' mapping to getOverlayChar() for footer layer display
- Added 'hgt' to dataOverlays filter array so active HGT overlay shows
  in the status section alongside other analysis layers

Changes to HelpOverlay.tsx:
- Added { key: 'H', desc: 'HGT passport', note: 'donor islands' } to
  the Quick Overlays section showing HGT as a quick-access analysis
- Added { key: 'A → Bias', desc: 'Dinucleotide PCA across phages' } to
  the Menus & Search section explaining analysis menu access
- Added { key: 'H', desc: 'HGT passport' } to the detailed Advanced
  Analysis section for power users

Changes to MenuOverlays.tsx:
- Added new analysis menu item for Bias Decomposition:
  - id: 'analysis-bias'
  - label: 'Dinucleotide Bias Decomposition'
  - description: 'PCA of dinucleotide frequencies across phages'
  - icon: '📊' (bar chart emoji)
  - shortcut: 'B1' (B for bias, 1 for unique identifier)
  - action: () => openOverlay('biasDecomposition')

Changes to CommandPalette.tsx:
- Added bias-decomposition command to intermediate commands list:
  - id: 'bias-decomposition'
  - label: 'Dinucleotide bias decomposition'
  - description: 'PCA on dinucleotide frequencies across phages'
  - keywords: ['bias', 'dinucleotide', 'pca']
  - action: () => toggleOverlay('biasDecomposition')

These changes ensure users can discover and access the new features
through multiple UI pathways: keyboard shortcuts (H), analysis menu,
command palette search, and help documentation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
